message:
fix(fnp-python): extract scalars from 0-d reduction results

Native reduction functions (sum, prod, mean, std, var, min, max, all, any,
argmin, argmax) were returning 0-d arrays instead of scalar types when
reducing to a single value. NumPy returns np.int64/np.float64/np.bool_
scalars in these cases. Now extract via .get_item(()) when result shape
is empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
